name: Southern Arc Minerals Inc.
description: Southern Arc Minerals Inc. is a Canadian company incorporated in British Columbia in 2004. Headquartered in Vancouver, the company operates as an investment vehicle that considers potential opportunities across various industries. Driven by a management team with decades of business expertise and a successful track record of identifying and advancing high-quality assets, Southern Arc is currently listed on the NEX board of the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol SA.H. The company remains committed to sourcing assets with significant potential for growth while maintaining its corporate presence in British Columbia.
